column1: %   Column 1  : Distance  — focal depth relative to the exit plane [mm].
%               Must match the values requested in calibration_setup exactly
%               (no interpolation is performed for Sonic Concepts tables).
%   Columns 2…N: one column per physical element
%               The column headers are arbitrary (not parsed by code).
%   Column N+1: trailing column (e.g. gain or notes) — ignored by code via
% For a 4-element transducer this file has 6 columns:
%   Distance | Phase_El1 | Phase_El2 | Phase_El3 | Phase_El4 | Gain
% Phases are manufacturer-specified and represent the hardware-driving phase
% for each element at that steering depth.  They will be used as starting
% phases in calibration_transducer and may be refined by perform_global_search.
% To add a new focal depth: insert a new row with the depth and the matching
% element phases.  Rows may appear in any order — the code searches by value.
